examples: I am very sorry indeed for my foolish and ungrateful conduct.
"I'm an ungrateful beast, I know," sobbed Toad, shedding bitter tears.
I thought I should choke; I could not tell any one, for that would have been ungrateful.
The young protagonist, Eddie, works days on a tree-cutting crew to support his ungrateful invalid mother.
His attitude, which probably strikes many people as ungrateful, is a powerful lesson for negotiators.
